OpenAI 发布智能时代工业政策建议

OpenAI: Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age

2026-04-12

OpenAI 发布了一系列以人为本的政策建议，旨在应对超级智能时代的挑战。这些建议旨在扩大机会、分享繁荣，并建立有韧性的制度——确保先进 AI 造福所有人。

核心理念：以人为本

随着我们向超级智能迈进，渐进式的政策更新已不足够。OpenAI 提出这些雄心勃勃但早期探索性的想法，作为讨论的起点，邀请他人通过民主程序来完善、挑战或选择。

推动举措

为维持这一讨论的势头，OpenAI 正在采取以下行动：

  • 通过 newindustrialpolicy@openai.com 收集反馈
  • 设立试点项目：提供最高 10 万美元的研究资助和最高 100 万美元的 API 积分
  • 5 月在华盛顿特区开设 OpenAI Workshop，举办系列讨论活动

政策建议文件

OpenAI 发布了一份完整的政策建议文档，涵盖如何在智能时代保持以人为本的发展理念。

阅读完整文档：Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age (PDF)

原文：https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age/

OpenAI has released a slate of people-first policy ideas designed to address the challenges of the superintelligence era. These proposals aim to expand opportunity, share prosperity, and build resilient institutions—ensuring that advanced AI benefits everyone.

Core Principle: People First

As we move toward superintelligence, incremental policy updates won't be enough. OpenAI offers these ambitious but exploratory ideas as a starting point for discussion, inviting others to build on, refine, challenge, or choose among them through the democratic process.

Sustaining Momentum

To help sustain momentum, OpenAI is taking the following actions:

  • Collecting feedback through newindustrialpolicy@openai.com
  • Establishing a pilot program of fellowships and research grants up to $100,000 and up to $1 million in API credits
  • Convening discussions at the new OpenAI Workshop opening in May in Washington, DC

Policy Document

OpenAI has published a comprehensive policy ideas document covering how to maintain people-first development principles in the intelligence age.

Read the full document: Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age (PDF)

Source: https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age/
